criteria.name: seeded_library_table
criteria.description: On load, the experiment library shows a data table with columns name, variants, sample size, status, started, and actions, listing at least 3 completed and at least 2 pending seeded experiments
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that seeded library table works as expected.

criteria.name: status_filter_and_search
criteria.description: Status filters narrow the visible rows to the chosen status with a removable active-filter indicator and an immediately updated row count, and typing in the search field narrows rows incrementally to matching names while clearing it restores the previously filtered set exactly
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that status filter and search works as expected.

criteria.name: bulk_archive_delete
criteria.description: Selecting two or more rows reveals a bulk action bar showing the selected count; confirming Archive selected moves every selected experiment to archived in one action, and confirming Delete selected removes exactly the selected rows
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that bulk archive delete works as expected.

criteria.name: archive_toggle_unarchive
criteria.description: An Archived toggle reveals archived experiments, and unarchiving one from its row actions returns it to its prior status
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that archive toggle unarchive works as expected.

criteria.name: designer_experiment_upsert_modal
criteria.description: Clicking New Experiment opens a modal that collects an ExperimentUpsert payload: name, hypothesis, successMetric, minimumSampleSize 1 to 500, and 2 to 4 variants each with title, promptId, model in {Larkspur-2, Cobalt-Mini, Meridian-XL, Fernwave-1}, temperature 0 to 2, and trafficAllocation
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that designer experiment upsert modal works as expected.

criteria.name: variant_add_remove_bounds
criteria.description: An Add variant control appends variants C and then D, remove controls delete C or D, and the designer never allows fewer than 2 or more than 4 variants
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that variant add remove bounds works as expected.

criteria.name: allocation_sum_live_validation
criteria.description: Each variant has a traffic allocation slider, adjusting one updates a displayed total immediately, the indicator turns to an error treatment with a message naming the allocation rule whenever the sum is not 100, and Submit stays disabled while the sum is not exactly 100
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that allocation sum live validation works as expected.

criteria.name: valid_submit_adds_pending
criteria.description: Submitting a valid designer form closes the modal, adds exactly one experiment with a Pending status badge, and increases the visible experiment count by one
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that valid submit adds pending works as expected.

criteria.name: invalid_submit_named_errors
criteria.description: Submitting with an empty name or hypothesis shows an inline validation message naming the offending field and adds no experiment
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that invalid submit named errors works as expected.

criteria.name: edit_prefilled_updates_row
criteria.description: A pending experiment's Edit action reopens the designer prefilled with its name, hypothesis, variants, allocations, metric, and minimum sample size, and saving updates the library row without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that edit prefilled updates row works as expected.

criteria.name: criteria_view_and_form
criteria.description: The Criteria view lists at least 4 seeded judge criteria with name, description, and pass threshold, and the New Criterion form validates name, description, and threshold (0 to 100) inline, adding nothing on an invalid submit
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that criteria view and form works as expected.

criteria.name: new_criterion_feeds_metric_select
criteria.description: A newly added judge criterion immediately appears as a choice in the designer's success metric select without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that new criterion feeds metric select works as expected.

criteria.name: preview_playground_columns
criteria.description: The designer's Preview opens a playground with one synchronized column per configured variant (2 to 4) under a single shared prompt-input row; running fills every column with a simulated response showing variant title, model name, latency, and tokens, and differently configured columns show different responses
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that preview playground columns works as expected.

criteria.name: preview_rerun_replaces_all
criteria.description: Editing the playground's shared input and running again replaces every column's response, and columns never show responses from different preview runs at the same time
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that preview rerun replaces all works as expected.

criteria.name: run_per_variant_progress
criteria.description: Clicking Run on a pending experiment fills a per-variant progress bar as that variant's samples complete, with a numeric fraction (such as 23 of 50 samples) beside each bar, while the row shows an inline loading indicator, the overall progress fraction, and a Running badge
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that run per variant progress works as expected.

criteria.name: pause_resume_preserves_samples
criteria.description: Pausing a running experiment freezes every variant's sample count and shows a Paused badge; resuming continues from exactly those counts and samples collected before the pause are never recollected or changed
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that pause resume preserves samples works as expected.

criteria.name: event_timeline_live_filterable
criteria.description: The run's event timeline lists started, sample milestone, paused, resumed, and completed entries in order with timestamps, gains entries live during the run, and can be filtered by entry type
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that event timeline live filterable works as expected.

criteria.name: results_grouped_bar_chart
criteria.description: A completed experiment's results panel shows a grouped bar chart of every variant's mean score per judge criterion, with criteria on the x-axis and one consistently colored series per variant
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that results grouped bar chart works as expected.

criteria.name: distributions_differ_by_config
criteria.description: The distribution strip shows a per-variant score distribution, and variants configured with different prompts or models show visibly different distributions
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that distributions differ by config works as expected.

criteria.name: difference_chart_ci_band
criteria.description: A difference chart plots the score delta between the leading variant and the baseline with a shaded 95 percent confidence band around the delta line
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that difference chart ci band works as expected.

criteria.name: summary_strip_stats
criteria.description: The summary strip shows four labeled stat cells — winner badge (variant letter or Tie), win rate percentage, p-value, and the 95 percent confidence interval for the score delta — computed from the current sample scores
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that summary strip stats works as expected.

criteria.name: underpowered_gate_then_verdict
criteria.description: Before every variant reaches the minimum sample size the summary shows an explicit Underpowered state naming how many samples are still needed with no significance verdict; at or past the threshold a p-value below 0.05 renders the winner badge in the success treatment and 0.05 or above renders it in the warning treatment labeled Not significant
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that underpowered gate then verdict works as expected.

criteria.name: sample_table_delta_sort
criteria.description: The sample-level table lists each input with every variant's score, sorts by score delta on header click, and reverses the order on a second click
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that sample table delta sort works as expected.

criteria.name: monitoring_convergence_chart
criteria.description: The Monitoring tab plots each variant's cumulative mean score against samples collected with a reference line at the minimum sample size, and hovering a point with the real pointer shows a tooltip with variant, sample count, and cumulative mean
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that monitoring convergence chart works as expected.

criteria.name: comparison_matrix_coherent
criteria.description: The Matrix tab shows one column per variant with rows for mean score, mean latency, mean tokens, token efficiency, and win rate, highlights the best cell per row, and its values agree with the summary strip and sample table
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that comparison matrix coherent works as expected.

criteria.name: radial_criterion_wheels
criteria.description: The Analytics tab renders a radial wheel per judge criterion whose ring fill is proportional to that criterion's pass rate with the numeric percentage in the center
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that radial criterion wheels works as expected.

criteria.name: inspector_flag_recompute
criteria.description: The Inspector tab lists each variant's responses with input, response text, per-criterion scores, latency, and tokens, switchable between variants without a reload; flagging a response as an outlier excludes it from every statistic and immediately produces a visible change in the summary strip, charts, matrix, and radial wheels, and unflagging recomputes them again
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that inspector flag recompute works as expected.

criteria.name: decision_locks_experiment
criteria.description: The decision dialog offers Declare winner, Inconclusive, or Stop early with a required rationale and disabled Submit until it is entered; confirming sets the status to Decided, shows the decision and rationale in the results header, and disables Edit and Flag outlier controls with a visible locked indicator
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that decision locks experiment works as expected.

criteria.name: promote_winner_head_version
criteria.description: Declaring a winner offers a Promote winner confirmation; confirming records the winning variant's prompt as the new head version in the prompt library panel and shows a success toast naming the variant
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that promote winner head version works as expected.

criteria.name: undo_redo_state_edits
criteria.description: Undo and Redo controls revert and reapply designer saves, outlier flag changes, archives, and deletions across every affected surface, disable when there is nothing to undo or redo, and confirmed decisions stay locked and excluded from undo
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that undo redo state edits works as expected.

criteria.name: export_report_api_shaped_live
criteria.description: Export report opens a preview of Experiment Report JSON with schemaVersion exactly ab-experiment-report-v1 and required keys experimentId, design, status, sampleCounts, statistics, decision, flaggedResponseIds, and generatedAt; design matches ExperimentUpsert; statistics exclude flagged outliers and match the results panel; after flagging or deciding the preview updates; Download offers experiment-report.json and Copy places the same JSON on the clipboard with visible confirmation
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that export report api shaped live works as expected.

criteria.name: double_activation_single_effect
criteria.description: Rapidly double-activating Run starts exactly one run (progress fills once, one completed result set), and rapidly double-activating the designer Submit creates exactly one experiment
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that double activation single effect works as expected.

criteria.name: empty_and_edge_states
criteria.description: When filters and search match nothing the table shows an empty state with a Clear filters control; deleting or archiving the open experiment empties its panel to a message with a control to choose another; flagging every response of a variant shows an insufficient-data state in the summary; a name longer than 60 characters truncates with an ellipsis in the row and shows in full in the results header
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that empty and edge states works as expected.

criteria.name: variant_removal_keeps_allocations
criteria.description: Removing a variant in the designer keeps the remaining allocation values unchanged while the sum indicator updates, requiring a manual rebalance before submitting
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that variant removal keeps allocations works as expected.

criteria.name: experiment_upsert_field_contract
criteria.description: The designer create and edit forms enforce the ExperimentUpsert field contract: name 1 to 120 characters, hypothesis 1 to 2000 characters, successMetric naming an existing criterion, minimumSampleSize 1 to 500, 2 to 4 variants each with title, promptId, model in {Larkspur-2, Cobalt-Mini, Meridian-XL, Fernwave-1}, temperature 0 to 2, and trafficAllocation values summing to exactly 100; invalid submits add no experiment and name the offending field
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that experiment upsert field contract works as expected.

criteria.name: criterion_and_decision_field_contracts
criteria.description: The New Criterion form enforces CriterionUpsert (unique name 1 to 60 characters, description 1 to 400 characters, passThreshold 0 to 100) and the decision dialog enforces DecisionUpsert (choice in declare-winner|inconclusive|stop-early, winnerVariant required only for declare-winner, rationale 1 to 1000 characters); invalid submits mutate nothing and name the offending field
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that criterion and decision field contracts works as expected.

criteria.name: import_report_round_trip
criteria.description: Import of a contract-valid Experiment Report JSON restores decision and flaggedResponseIds on the matching experiment so the results header, summary strip, inspector flags, and a fresh export match the imported document; a payload with schemaVersion other than ab-experiment-report-v1 or allocations not summing to 100 leaves the experiment unchanged and shows an inline error naming the offending field
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that import report round trip works as expected.

criteria.name: empty_states_designed
criteria.description: Empty state UI renders when filters match nothing, when the flagged-only inspector filter has no entries, when the timeline filter has no entries, and when the open experiment is deleted or archived.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that empty states designed works as expected.

criteria.name: field_contracts_validate_inline
criteria.description: The designer (ExperimentUpsert including allocations-sum-to-100), criterion form (CriterionUpsert), decision dialog (DecisionUpsert), and Experiment Report Import all validate inline before apply, naming the offending field.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that field contracts validate inline works as expected.

criteria.name: errors_name_field_and_fix
criteria.description: Validation messages name the offending field or rule and the fix — for example that allocations must sum to 100, that schemaVersion must be ab-experiment-report-v1, or that a rationale is required — rather than only saying Invalid.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that errors name field and fix works as expected.

criteria.name: actions_show_confirmation
criteria.description: Creating, deciding, promoting, archiving, and exporting each produce visible success feedback such as a toast naming what happened.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that actions show confirmation works as expected.

criteria.name: run_shows_progress_affordances
criteria.description: Simulated runs show loading affordances: inline loading on the running row, filling per-variant progress bars, and numeric sample fractions.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that run shows progress affordances works as expected.

criteria.name: destructive_actions_guarded
criteria.description: Delete and bulk delete require confirmation dialogs, cancel leaves data intact, and undo reverts archives and deletions.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that destructive actions guarded works as expected.

criteria.name: nonobvious_controls_have_help
criteria.description: Non-obvious controls — the Underpowered state, token efficiency row, and outlier flag — carry a tooltip or inline explanation.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that nonobvious controls have help works as expected.

criteria.name: controls_use_semantic_tags
criteria.description: Buttons, inputs, sliders, and labels use semantic elements rather than bare divs or spans.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that controls use semantic tags works as expected.

criteria.name: modal_close_paths
criteria.description: The designer, decision, and confirmation modals close from their close control, Escape, and a background click where offered.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that modal close paths works as expected.

criteria.name: long_run_shows_progress
criteria.description: A full run to the sample target continuously shows progress — fractions, bars, and timeline entries — never a frozen or blank interval.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that long run shows progress works as expected.

criteria.name: export_always_schema_valid
criteria.description: Opening Export report on a completed seeded experiment before any in-session flag or decision still produces valid JSON with schemaVersion ab-experiment-report-v1 and every required top-level key; the panel never shows an empty or broken region.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that export always schema valid works as expected.

criteria.name: import_rejects_invalid_contract
criteria.description: Importing malformed JSON or parseable JSON that fails the Experiment Report field contract (wrong schemaVersion, status outside completed|decided, variants length outside 2 to 4, allocations not summing to 100, or decision non-null while status is completed) leaves the experiment unchanged and shows validation naming the offending field.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that import rejects invalid contract works as expected.

criteria.name: spacing_follows_studio_rhythm
criteria.description: Gaps between the library table, results panel, chart blocks, summary tiles, and Export panel follow a visually regular spacing rhythm with no crowded or orphaned regions.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that spacing follows studio rhythm works as expected.

criteria.name: typography_matches_studio_hierarchy
criteria.description: Typography matches the instruction hierarchy: app title larger than panel and tab headings, which are larger than table body and label text, including Export panel headings.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that typography matches studio hierarchy works as expected.

criteria.name: layout_matches_library_and_panel_spec
criteria.description: Layout matches the specified library-plus-sliding-results-panel composition with modal designer and decision dialogs, within a small tolerance at desktop and 768px breakpoints.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that layout matches library and panel spec works as expected.

criteria.name: specified_state_changes_animate
criteria.description: Transitions apply to the state changes the spec calls out: results panel slide-in, progress fill, chart bar growth, row enter/exit, modal transitions, and flag/stat updates.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that specified state changes animate works as expected.

criteria.name: responsive_behavior_matches_spec
criteria.description: Responsive behavior matches the spec: full-width results panel with back control at 768px and below, alongside panel on desktop, and no page-level horizontal scroll at 375px.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that responsive behavior matches spec works as expected.

criteria.name: control_styling_matches_carbon_chrome
criteria.description: Buttons, inputs, selects, sliders, tags, and tiles show distinct default, hover, focus, disabled, and error treatments consistent with the studio chrome.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that control styling matches carbon chrome works as expected.

criteria.name: typography_has_clear_hierarchy
criteria.description: Typography has a clear hierarchy that distinguishes the app title, results tab labels, summary tile labels, and table body text.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that typography has clear hierarchy works as expected.

criteria.name: component_states_match_spec
criteria.description: Component states match the spec, including disabled Submit while allocations do not sum to 100, locked Edit/Flag after a decision, and disabled Undo/Redo when the stacks are empty.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that component states match spec works as expected.

criteria.name: surface_treatments_match_spec
criteria.description: Status badge colors (gray pending, blue running, teal paused, green completed, purple decided, muted archived), winner-badge treatments, and confidence-band translucent fill match the specified surface treatments.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that surface treatments match spec works as expected.

criteria.name: microinteractions_match_spec
criteria.description: Hover wash on table/timeline/inspector rows, button press easing, and toast slide/auto-dismiss follow the specified microinteraction feedback.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that microinteractions match spec works as expected.

criteria.name: linked_chart_highlighting
criteria.description: Optional polish: hovering a variant series on the grouped bar, monitoring, or matrix surfaces linked-highlights the same variant across the other results charts.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that linked chart highlighting works as expected.

criteria.name: timeline_scrub_or_jump
criteria.description: Optional polish: the run event timeline offers a jump-to-milestone or filter chip interaction beyond bare chronological listing.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that timeline scrub or jump works as expected.

criteria.name: first_run_coachmarks
criteria.description: Optional polish: a short coachmark or empty-library guidance steers a new operator toward New Experiment, Run, and Export report.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that first run coachmarks works as expected.

criteria.name: enhanced_interactive_graphics
criteria.description: Data visualizations — the distribution strip, difference chart with confidence band, monitoring convergence chart, and radial wheels — provide extra usability beyond the minimum, such as richer tooltips, legends, or linked highlighting.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that enhanced interactive graphics works as expected.

criteria.name: keyboard_power_user_shortcuts
criteria.description: Optional polish: keyboard shortcuts beyond basic tab order accelerate common actions such as opening New Experiment or Export report.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that keyboard power user shortcuts works as expected.

criteria.name: saved_filter_presets
criteria.description: Optional polish: operators can save or reapply a library status-filter and search combination as a named preset.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that saved filter presets works as expected.

criteria.name: experiment_narrative_summary
criteria.description: Optional polish: the Export panel or results header includes a short plain-language narrative of winner, power, and decision beyond raw statistics.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that experiment narrative summary works as expected.

criteria.name: theme_density_toggle
criteria.description: Optional polish: a density or theme control beyond requirements adjusts table and chart chrome without breaking the Carbon look.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that theme density toggle works as expected.

criteria.name: offline_export_resilience
criteria.description: Optional polish: Export report and Copy remain usable if the clipboard API is unavailable, with a visible fallback such as selectable preview text.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that offline export resilience works as expected.

criteria.name: competition_level_studio_polish
criteria.description: Competition-level innovation is visible: the studio feels like a real prompt-eval console rather than a thin CRUD demo, especially around run monitoring and the Experiment Report pack.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that competition level studio polish works as expected.

criteria.name: innovation_catchall
criteria.description: The app demonstrates a noteworthy, browser-observable enhancement beyond the spec that is NOT covered by any other criterion in this file. The enhancement must plausibly matter to a real user, not be a nitpick. If present, name the enhancement and cite the concrete evidence (element, page state, screenshot) that demonstrates it. If the enhancement is already covered — even partially — by another criterion in this file, answer no here and let that criterion carry it.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that innovation catchall works as expected.

criteria.name: headings_use_consistent_capitalization
criteria.description: Where the app renders headings and section titles, they use consistent capitalization (one convention — title case or sentence case — throughout).
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that headings use consistent capitalization works as expected.

criteria.name: actions_use_specific_labels
criteria.description: Where the app renders button or action labels, they are specific verbs such as 'Run experiment', 'Flag outlier', and 'Declare winner', not generic ('Submit', 'OK') when a specific label is possible.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that actions use specific labels works as expected.

criteria.name: errors_name_problem_and_fix
criteria.description: Where the app renders error messages, they name the problem and the fix — for example that allocations must sum to 100 percent, that schemaVersion must be ab-experiment-report-v1, or that a rationale is required before deciding — not just a rejection ('Invalid').
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that errors name problem and fix works as expected.

criteria.name: empty_states_explain_next_step
criteria.description: Where the app renders empty states (filtered library, flagged-only inspector, empty timeline filter, emptied results panel), the copy explains what belongs there and how to get it there.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that empty states explain next step works as expected.

criteria.name: body_copy_is_well_written
criteria.description: Where the app renders body or marketing copy, rate how free it is of spelling and grammatical errors.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that body copy is well written works as expected.

criteria.name: terminology_is_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app renders labels for the same concept in multiple places, terminology is consistent (experiment, variant, criterion, p-value, Export report) rather than mixing synonyms unpredictably.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that terminology is consistent works as expected.

criteria.name: numbers_dates_and_units_are_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app renders numbers, dates, and units, formatting is consistent: p-values, percentages, latencies in milliseconds, and token counts use the same precision and units wherever they appear.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that numbers dates and units are consistent works as expected.

criteria.name: success_messages_are_specific
criteria.description: Where the app renders confirmation and success messages after create, decide, promote, archive, export, copy, or import, they state what happened, not vague affirmations.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that success messages are specific works as expected.

criteria.name: create_experiment_upsert_everywhere
criteria.description: Create flow: submitting a valid ExperimentUpsert through the designer adds a Pending library row whose name, variant titles, sample size, and Edit prefill match the submitted payload fields.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that create experiment upsert everywhere works as expected.

criteria.name: invalid_upsert_inline_validation
criteria.description: Create flow: submitting the designer with an empty name or hypothesis, a model outside the closed enum, a temperature outside 0 to 2, or allocations not summing to 100 triggers immediate inline validation naming the field or rule, before any experiment is added.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that invalid upsert inline validation works as expected.

criteria.name: edit_updates_row_and_panel
criteria.description: Edit flow: saving edits to a pending experiment updates the library row and any open panel header without a reload.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that edit updates row and panel works as expected.

criteria.name: delete_removes_from_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Delete flow: a deleted experiment disappears from the library table, the selection, and any open results panel.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that delete removes from all surfaces works as expected.

criteria.name: tab_switch_retains_state
criteria.description: View switch: switching between the Results, Monitoring, Matrix, Analytics, and Inspector tabs retains the experiment context, applied sample-table sort, and inspector variant choice.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that tab switch retains state works as expected.

criteria.name: empty_library_state_visible
criteria.description: Edge: deleting or filtering away every visible experiment shows a clear empty state with a message and a Clear filters or create control.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that empty library state visible works as expected.

criteria.name: filters_and_search_consistent
criteria.description: Edge: status filters and search narrow the table consistently — the row count, bulk-selection scope, and empty state all agree with the applied filters.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that filters and search consistent works as expected.

criteria.name: panel_close_reopen_continuity
criteria.description: Collapsible chrome: closing the results panel and reopening the same experiment restores its tabs and content with workflow continuity.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that panel close reopen continuity works as expected.

criteria.name: dialogs_and_export_import_flows
criteria.description: Overlays: the designer, preview playground, decision dialog, Export report panel with Copy/Download/Import, and confirmation dialogs open, complete, and cancel as expected without losing surrounding state.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that dialogs and export import flows works as expected.

criteria.name: recovery_without_reload
criteria.description: Recovery: canceling the designer mid-edit, dismissing a confirmation, or closing the panel never dead-ends the app; every flow is recoverable without a reload.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that recovery without reload works as expected.

criteria.name: export_after_mutations_flow
criteria.description: Export after mutations: flag one outlier on a completed experiment, open Export report, and confirm statistics and flaggedResponseIds reflect the flag; decide with a rationale, reopen Export, and confirm status is decided and decision carries the choice and rationale with schemaVersion ab-experiment-report-v1.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that export after mutations flow works as expected.

criteria.name: import_round_trip_flow
criteria.description: Import round trip: Download a contract-valid experiment-report.json after a flag and decision, reload to seeded state, Import it, and confirm decision, flags, statistics, and a fresh export reconstruct; Import of schemaVersion other than ab-experiment-report-v1 leaves state unchanged with a named-field error.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that import round trip flow works as expected.

criteria.name: controls_are_keyboard_accessible
criteria.description: All interactive controls — library table rows and headers, status filters, bulk actions, designer fields and allocation sliders, results tabs, Flag outlier, pause/resume, undo/redo, Export report, Copy, Download, and Import — are keyboard accessible with Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter/Space, and arrow keys on sliders.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that controls are keyboard accessible works as expected.

criteria.name: modals_manage_focus
criteria.description: The designer, decision, Export report, and confirmation modals trap focus, close on Escape, and return focus to the originating control on close.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that modals manage focus works as expected.

criteria.name: icons_have_accessible_names
criteria.description: Toolbar, row-action, tab, and flag icons from the Carbon icon set expose accessible names or aria-labels rather than unlabeled decorative glyphs.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that icons have accessible names works as expected.

criteria.name: feedback_uses_live_regions
criteria.description: Run completion, decisions, significance verdicts, Export/Import feedback, and validation errors are conveyed both visually and via ARIA live regions.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that feedback uses live regions works as expected.

criteria.name: forms_have_explicit_labels
criteria.description: All ExperimentUpsert, CriterionUpsert, DecisionUpsert, and Import fields use explicit label elements, and the allocation sliders expose their current value to assistive technology.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that forms have explicit labels works as expected.

criteria.name: headings_follow_logical_order
criteria.description: Headings follow a logical order across the library, results panel tabs, and Export panel with no skips, such as H1 to H2 to H3.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that headings follow logical order works as expected.

criteria.name: landmark_navigation_is_present
criteria.description: Landmark regions such as main for the library canvas and complementary or dialog roles for the results and Export panels support skip-style navigation.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that landmark navigation is present works as expected.

criteria.name: text_and_controls_have_contrast
criteria.description: Library rows, status badges, summary tiles, chart labels, and form controls have sufficient color contrast.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that text and controls have contrast works as expected.

criteria.name: semantic_html_roles_are_used
criteria.description: Semantic HTML roles such as main, table, tablist, dialog, and button are used for the library, results tabs, designer, and Export panel.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that semantic html roles are used works as expected.

criteria.name: reduced_motion_is_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, progress jumps to current values, the results panel appears instantly, and modal, row, chart, and toast transitions apply instantly.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that reduced motion is respected works as expected.

criteria.name: cold_start_is_under_two_seconds
criteria.description: Cold start to interactive library table and toolbar is under 2 seconds on local render.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that cold start is under two seconds works as expected.

criteria.name: console_is_clean
criteria.description: Browser devtools show no errors or warnings on load or during design, run, flag, decide, export, and import flows.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that console is clean works as expected.

criteria.name: tab_and_filter_transitions_snappy
criteria.description: Results-tab switches, status-filter toggles, and sample-table sorts respond without multi-second stalls.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that tab and filter transitions snappy works as expected.

criteria.name: run_shows_loading_indicators
criteria.description: Simulated runs show loading affordances: inline loading on the running row, filling per-variant progress bars, and numeric sample fractions.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that run shows loading indicators works as expected.

criteria.name: sample_and_inspector_lists_stay_fluid
criteria.description: The sample-level table and inspector list render their full simulated result sets without perceived lag, and sorting or filtering them stays immediate.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that sample and inspector lists stay fluid works as expected.

criteria.name: state_changes_remain_interactive
criteria.description: The UI remains interactive while a run is filling progress bars and appending timeline entries, including opening Export report.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that state changes remain interactive works as expected.

criteria.name: chart_animations_maintain_frame_rate
criteria.description: Chart grow-from-zero, progress fill, and results-panel slide maintain smooth motion without visible frame drops during a typical run.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that chart animations maintain frame rate works as expected.

criteria.name: rapid_input_does_not_freeze
criteria.description: Quick tab switches, rapid sort clicks, and fast filter toggles do not hang or freeze the app, including while a run is in progress.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that rapid input does not freeze works as expected.

criteria.name: underpowered_and_import_errors_stay_responsive
criteria.description: Underpowered summary state and Import validation errors render without blocking the library or other tabs.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that underpowered and import errors stay responsive works as expected.

criteria.name: library_and_slide_panel_layout
criteria.description: The experiment library table fills the main area and opening an experiment slides a results panel in from the right containing the Results, Monitoring, Matrix, Analytics, and Inspector tabs, while the designer, decision, and Export report dialogs render as modal or panel overlays
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that library and slide panel layout works as expected.

criteria.name: status_tag_color_mapping
criteria.description: The library table shows columns name, variants, sample size, status, started, and actions in that order, and status badges use tag treatments of gray for pending, blue for running, teal for paused, green for completed, purple for decided, and a muted treatment for archived
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that status tag color mapping works as expected.

criteria.name: consistent_variant_series_colors
criteria.description: The first variant renders in the brand accent and each additional variant in a distinct supporting accent, with the same variant-to-color mapping used across the grouped bar chart, distribution strip, difference chart, monitoring chart, and matrix highlights
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that consistent variant series colors works as expected.

criteria.name: summary_strip_badge_treatments
criteria.description: The summary strip renders as a horizontal row of four labeled stat tiles where the winner badge is green when significant, yellow with the Not significant label when not, gray for Tie, and the Underpowered state uses a neutral informational treatment that is never green or yellow
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that summary strip badge treatments works as expected.

criteria.name: confidence_band_translucent_fill
criteria.description: The difference chart's 95 percent confidence band renders as a translucent fill around the delta line, visually distinct from the line itself
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that confidence band translucent fill works as expected.

criteria.name: radial_wheels_consistent
criteria.description: Each radial criterion wheel shows its pass percentage in the ring center with the ring fill proportional to the value, and rings for different criteria are visually consistent in size and stroke
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that radial wheels consistent works as expected.

criteria.name: typography_and_spacing_rhythm
criteria.description: Typography shows a clear hierarchy (app title larger than panel and tab headings, which are larger than table body and label text) and gaps between the table, panel, chart blocks, and stat tiles follow a visually regular rhythm with no crowded or orphaned regions
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that typography and spacing rhythm works as expected.

criteria.name: control_states_and_icon_set
criteria.description: Buttons, inputs, selects, sliders, and toggles show distinct default, hover, focus (visible ring), disabled, and error treatments, and one consistent icon set is used across the toolbar, row actions, tabs, and flag controls
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that control states and icon set works as expected.

criteria.name: responsive_panel_and_containers
criteria.description: At widths of 768 pixels and below the results panel opens full-width over the library with a visible back control while desktop widths show it alongside, and at 375 pixel width no content clips or overflows the viewport, no page-level horizontal scrolling appears, and the library table, matrix, and sample table scroll within their own containers
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that responsive panel and containers works as expected.

criteria.name: shared_state_coherence
criteria.description: All surfaces derive from one shared state: advancing samples updates the progress bars, event timeline, and monitoring chart together; flagging an outlier updates the summary strip, charts, matrix, radial wheels, and Export report JSON together; and an experiment edit, archive, decision, or Import is reflected in every view where it appears, all without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that shared state coherence works as expected.

criteria.name: no_storage_reload_seeded
criteria.description: No browser storage is used: localStorage and sessionStorage remain empty after creating, editing, running, pausing, flagging, deciding, archiving, exporting, and importing, and a page reload returns the app to its seeded state (seeded experiments and criteria, default view, no unseeded decisions or flags)
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that no storage reload seeded works as expected.

criteria.name: console_clean
criteria.description: The console is free of errors and warnings on first load and stays clean while designing, previewing, running, pausing, flagging, deciding, undoing, archiving, exporting, importing, and switching tabs
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that console clean works as expected.

criteria.name: cold_load_interactive_2s
criteria.description: The app is interactive (library table and toolbar controls respond) within 2 seconds of a local cold load
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that cold load interactive 2s works as expected.

criteria.name: responsive_during_run
criteria.description: While a run is filling progress bars, the UI stays responsive under rapid repeated input — quick tab switches, rapid sort clicks, fast filter toggles — with no hangs, dropped interactions, or views showing stale data another view already updated
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that responsive during run works as expected.

criteria.name: statistics_react_to_data
criteria.description: The p-value, confidence interval, win rate, matrix values, and Export report statistics object are computed from the current sample data excluding flagged outliers: flagging outliers or completing additional samples changes them, and the same quantities agree wherever they are shown
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that statistics react to data works as expected.

criteria.name: keyboard_operability_focus
criteria.description: Every interactive control — table rows and headers, filters, bulk actions, designer fields and allocation sliders, tabs, flag controls, pause/resume, undo/redo, export, copy, and import — is reachable and operable with the keyboard alone (Tab/Shift+Tab, Enter/Space, arrow keys on sliders), with a visible focus indicator at each stop
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that keyboard operability focus works as expected.

criteria.name: modal_focus_trap_escape
criteria.description: The designer, decision, and confirmation modals trap keyboard focus while open, close on the Escape key, and return focus to the control that opened them
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that modal focus trap escape works as expected.

criteria.name: aria_live_announcements
criteria.description: Run completion, a decision being recorded, and the significance verdict activating are announced through an aria-live region in addition to their visual indication
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that aria live announcements works as expected.

criteria.name: labels_slider_values_errors
criteria.description: Form fields in the designer, criterion form, and decision dialog have visible labels, the allocation sliders expose their current value to assistive technology, and each validation message names the field or rule it belongs to and renders in association with it
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that labels slider values errors works as expected.

criteria.name: fictional_model_names_only
criteria.description: Every model name rendered anywhere in the UI is fictional; no real AI provider or model brand names appear
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that fictional model names only works as expected.

criteria.name: export_import_end_state_contract
criteria.description: Export produces schema-valid Experiment Report JSON with schemaVersion ab-experiment-report-v1 reflecting session flags and decisions, and Import of a contract-valid report restores decision and flags while contract-invalid import refuses partial mutation — the good-app end state without browser storage
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that export import end state contract works as expected.

criteria.name: layout_adapts_desktop_to_mobile
criteria.description: Layout adapts gracefully from 1440px desktop to 375px mobile: the library table, results panel, charts, summary tiles, and Export panel reflow without breakage.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that layout adapts desktop to mobile works as expected.

criteria.name: mobile_tap_targets_are_large_enough
criteria.description: Row actions, tabs, Flag outlier, pause/resume, Export, Copy, Download, and Import are tap targets at least 44px on mobile.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that mobile tap targets are large enough works as expected.

criteria.name: typography_resizes_across_breakpoints
criteria.description: App title, panel headings, table body, and summary tile labels resize readably between mobile and desktop.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that typography resizes across breakpoints works as expected.

criteria.name: content_avoids_clipping_and_overflow
criteria.description: No content clips or overflows the viewport at any width; the matrix, sample table, and Export JSON preview scroll within their own containers.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that content avoids clipping and overflow works as expected.

criteria.name: panel_fullwidth_with_back
criteria.description: At widths of 768 pixels and below the results panel opens full-width over the library with a visible back control returning to the table; at desktop widths it opens alongside.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that panel fullwidth with back works as expected.

criteria.name: stacking_reflows_logically
criteria.description: Summary strip tiles, chart blocks, and matrix columns stack logically at narrow widths without overlapping the library controls.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that stacking reflows logically works as expected.

criteria.name: mobile_touch_gestures_work
criteria.description: Tap targets for filters, tabs, Flag outlier, and Export controls work on a touch-width viewport where present.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that mobile touch gestures work works as expected.

criteria.name: small_screens_avoid_horizontal_scroll
criteria.description: At 375 pixel width no page-level horizontal scrolling appears for the library, results tabs, or Export panel.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that small screens avoid horizontal scroll works as expected.

criteria.name: charts_resize_responsively
criteria.description: The grouped bar, distribution, difference, monitoring, and radial charts resize responsively to fit their containers at every width.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that charts resize responsively works as expected.

criteria.name: fixed_controls_remain_accessible
criteria.description: Header Undo/Redo and Export controls remain reachable on mobile without being covered by the full-width results panel back control.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that fixed controls remain accessible works as expected.

criteria.name: progress_fills_continuously
criteria.description: During a run started from the real Run control, per-variant progress bars fill continuously, updating at least every 200 milliseconds rather than jumping in large steps
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that progress fills continuously works as expected.

criteria.name: results_panel_slide_250ms
criteria.description: Clicking an experiment row slides the results panel in from the right over roughly 250 milliseconds, and closing it slides the panel out
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that results panel slide 250ms works as expected.

criteria.name: chart_bars_grow_on_tab
criteria.description: Switching to a results tab through the real tab control grows the chart bars from zero height over roughly 400 milliseconds rather than snapping to full height
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that chart bars grow on tab works as expected.

criteria.name: row_enter_exit_animation
criteria.description: Newly created library rows animate in and bulk-archived rows animate out through the real controls, rather than appearing or vanishing instantly
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that row enter exit animation works as expected.

criteria.name: flag_and_stat_transitions
criteria.description: Flagging an outlier through the real Flag control animates the flag treatment on, and the dependent stat tiles transition to their new values rather than snapping
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that flag and stat transitions works as expected.

criteria.name: hover_animations_required
criteria.description: Buttons ease background and shadow with a slight press effect on hover; table rows, timeline entries, and inspector rows take a full-width hover wash; and form controls show focus rings
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that hover animations required works as expected.

criteria.name: modal_scale_opacity_transition
criteria.description: The designer and decision modals enter and exit with a short opacity-plus-scale transition of roughly 200 to 300 milliseconds
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that modal scale opacity transition works as expected.

criteria.name: toasts_slide_autodismiss
criteria.description: Feedback toasts after creating, deciding, promoting, archiving, and exporting slide in, remain readable long enough to scan, and auto-dismiss with a fade
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that toasts slide autodismiss works as expected.

criteria.name: reduced_motion_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, progress jumps directly to current values, the results panel appears instantly, and modal, row, chart, and toast transitions apply instantly
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that reduced motion respected works as expected.

criteria.name: multi_facet_reload_resets_seeded
criteria.description: Multi-facet round-trip: apply a status filter, flag one outlier in a completed experiment's inspector, sort the sample table by score delta, and create a new experiment, then reload the page. All four facets coherently reset to the seeded baseline (seeded experiments and criteria, no unseeded flags, default sort and filters) — never a mix of surviving and reset facets.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that multi facet reload resets seeded works as expected.

criteria.name: sample_table_sort_reversal
criteria.description: Sort-reversal proof: sort the sample-level table by score delta ascending, note the row order, then sort descending; the order reverses correctly relative to ascending, proving sort derives from live sample data rather than two hardcoded orders.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that sample table sort reversal works as expected.

criteria.name: flag_recomputes_derived_surfaces
criteria.description: Derived-view sensitivity: flag one outlier response in the inspector and confirm the p-value, per-variant means, matrix cells, and radial pass-rate percentages all visibly change; unflag it and confirm they return to their prior values.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that flag recomputes derived surfaces works as expected.

criteria.name: decision_echoes_across_views
criteria.description: Cross-view echo: record a decision in the decision dialog and confirm the library row's status badge changes to Decided and the results panel header shows the decision and rationale, without a reload; likewise an experiment rename from the designer updates both the library row and the open panel header.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that decision echoes across views works as expected.

criteria.name: experiment_count_delta_exact
criteria.description: Count-delta integrity: note the visible experiment count, create one experiment, and confirm the count increased by exactly one; then bulk-delete two selected experiments and confirm the count decreased by exactly two immediately.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that experiment count delta exact works as expected.

criteria.name: full_pipeline_to_export_json
criteria.description: Full-pipeline probe: design a new experiment via ExperimentUpsert with differently configured variants, run it to completion, flag one outlier and confirm summary statistics change, declare a winner with DecisionUpsert rationale, then open Export report and confirm schemaVersion ab-experiment-report-v1, post-flag statistics, flaggedResponseIds, and the decision rationale — each stage feeding the next
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that full pipeline to export json works as expected.

criteria.name: interleaved_designer_and_run
criteria.description: Interleaved-flow integrity: open the designer and partially fill it, leave to start a run on another pending experiment, return to the designer and complete the creation; confirm the run progressed independently and the created experiment matches what was entered, with neither flow corrupting the other.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that interleaved designer and run works as expected.

criteria.name: flag_all_then_restore_round_trip
criteria.description: Edge-state round-trip: flag every response of one variant so the summary shows the insufficient-data state, then unflag them; the summary strip, charts, matrix, and radial wheels track through both transitions back to their original values.
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that flag all then restore round trip works as expected.

criteria.name: import_export_round_trip_probe
criteria.description: Import/export round-trip: on a completed experiment, flag one outlier and declare a winner with a rationale, Download experiment-report.json, reload to seeded state, Import that file onto the matching experiment, and confirm decision header, locked controls, flagged inspector treatment, summary statistics, and a fresh export reconstruct to match; then Import a payload with schemaVersion other than ab-experiment-report-v1 and confirm state is unchanged with a named-field error
criteria.reasoning: Observed via browser/code that import export round trip probe works as expected.
